title: Molly the Warrior
description: Adds a variant for cats when named "Molly".
body:
![Molly Icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/65ebb6deafea16d15b7d8eef2901d028033d4261.png)
# Molly the Warrior

This mod adds a special cat variant to Minecraft in honor of Molly. When any cat is named "**Molly**" or "**molly**", its texture changes to resemble Molly, keeping her memory alive in the game.
